subcodes.first_line: For several days hath the divine Pavilion become established as the Seat of the Throne, and this is that station which was mentioned in the former Books [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: چند یومیست که کوم الله مقر عرش واقع شده و این آن مقامیست که در کتب قبل مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @light and darkness, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
